---
name: Documentation or evidence correction
about: Report an unclear integration boundary, stale link, or evidence mismatch
title: "[docs] "
---

## Location

Link the affected document, README section, evidence item, or public tag.

## Proposed Correction

State the exact wording, link, or provenance correction and explain how it can
be checked from public material.

## Scope Check

Do not include PDK data, licenses, private paths, credentials, or proprietary
tool output.
